mnemonics: PRESS for Quality: Plan, Review, Ensure Standards, Simulate
Every Developer Creates Software Safely (EDCSS): Estimation, Design, Construction, Software Quality, Safety
keyPoints: A systematic, disciplined, quantifiable approach to software development, operation, and maintenance.
Encompasses a process, methods for analysis/design/construction, and management techniques.
Focuses on practical application of principles to deliver high-quality software on time and within budget.
commonMistakes: Treating it as a rigid, one-size-fits-all recipe instead of an adaptable framework.
Focusing only on technical processes while neglecting project management and people aspects.
Confusing 'agile' with a lack of discipline, rather than a different application of engineering principles.
